name_en: ❤️B's latest tote bag, crafted from calfskin suede. Handcrafted in an Italian workshop with matching suede lining. Features the iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim, and a top handle. Includes a detachable leather shoulder strap for versatile shoulder or handbag styling.
name_cn:
❤️B's latest tote bag, crafted from calfskin suede. Handcrafted in an Italian workshop with matching suede lining. Features the iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim, and a top handle. Includes a detachable leather shoulder strap for versatile shoulder or handbag styling.
Back features embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD)
Large size 35.5x18 x 28cm
